examples: A little mustard is served on the side to add further piquancy.
He dropped his hot dog on the pavement and someone's dog ate it, mustard and all.
Your wit is as thick as Tewkesbury Mustard.
If the leaves are not in good shape, swap in mustard greens or spinach.
Despite the difficulty of access, inspectors had uncovered tons of deadly chemicals, among them mustard gas.
